# Block Expressions

{variable}

{1 + 2 + 3}

{`template literal`}

{`template with ${interpolation}`}

{/* JSX comment */}

{/* multi

{(() => {
  const x = 1
  return x + 2
})()}

  <li key={item.id}>{item.name}</li>
))}

{condition
  ? 'true branch'

{obj.nested.deeply.value}

{array[0]}

{fn(arg1, arg2, { key: 'value' })}

{{a: 1, b: 2, c: {d: 3}}}

# Inline Expressions

The value is {x}.

Hello {firstName} {lastName}!

Total: {a + b} items.

Date: {formatDate(new Date())}.

Result: {nested({a: {b: 1}})}.

Empty: {} expression.

Backtick: {`hello ${name}`} world.
